name: Bee
description_short: O Bee Credit Union is a Washington State-based credit union offering no-fee rewards checking accounts with debit card rewards points and nationwide ATM access.
description_long:
O Bee Credit Union was founded in 1955 as the financial partner for Olympia Brewery employees and has since expanded to serve anyone living or working in Washington State. Originally established at the brewery, the institution has maintained strong regional roots while modernizing its service offerings. Today, O Bee operates as a full-service credit union with membership eligibility based on geographic location within Washington State.

O Bee's primary offering is their Rewards Checking account, which features no monthly maintenance fees, no debit card fees, and a $1 minimum opening deposit. Members earn ScoreCard Rewards points on debit card purchases—1 point per $3 spent on signature-based transactions—redeemable for travel, hotels, flights, shopping, dining, and merchandise. The account includes free online and mobile banking, free bill pay, unlimited check writing, access to thousands of no-fee ATMs nationwide, and a choice of six card designs featuring Olympia Beer branding. Members can also link their checking to savings accounts and credit cards for overdraft protection, with fees waived on transactions under $5.

O Bee distinguishes itself through its iconic Olympia Beer-branded debit cards, which feature designs recognized worldwide and referenced in classic Hollywood films. The credit union combines regional heritage with modern conveniences like mobile check deposit, Apple Pay/Samsung Pay integration, and a refer-a-friend program offering $50 Amazon eGift Cards. Rewards points do not expire, and members can combine points across family members to earn rewards faster. The institution maintains a federal NCUA insurance backing and emphasizes personalized service with a toll-free customer line.

O Bee is best suited for Washington State residents or workers seeking a straightforward, no-fee checking account with meaningful rewards on everyday purchases. The main caveat is geographic restriction—membership requires living or working in Washington State. Additionally, while the rewards rate (1 point per $3) is competitive for debit cards, it's substantially lower than credit card rewards (1 point per $1), and cash advances and ATM withdrawals earn no points. Overdraft fees may still apply despite protection features. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Rewards Checking account with no monthly maintenance fees
ScoreCard Rewards points system on debit card purchases
Free online banking and bill pay
Mobile banking app with check deposit functionality
Debit card with six Olympia Beer-themed design options
Overdraft protection linking checking to savings and credit products
Apple Pay, Samsung Pay, and Android Pay integration
Mobile and text banking (data rates may apply)
Visa Rewards credit card with ScoreCard points (1 point per $1)
Refer-a-friend program ($50 Amazon eGift Card incentive)
Financial calculators for savings and loan planning
pros: No monthly maintenance fees, debit card fees, or ATM fees within nationwide surcharge-free network
Rewards points on everyday debit card purchases redeemable for travel, hotels, flights, and merchandise—points never expire
Only $1 minimum opening deposit required to open account
Free online banking, mobile app, bill pay, and mobile check deposit included
Overdraft protection available by linking to savings accounts, credit cards, or lines of credit; fees waived for transactions under $5
Six iconic Olympia Beer-branded debit card design options available
Ability to combine rewards points with family members for faster redemption
cons: Membership restricted to residents or employees in Washington State only
Debit card rewards rate of 1 point per $3 is significantly lower than credit card rate of 1 point per $1
Cash advances, ATM withdrawals, and check advances earn no rewards points
Overdraft fees may still apply despite protection options; maximum daily fee exists but amount not disclosed
Limited geographic footprint compared to national banks for in-person branch access
best_for: Washington State residents who want no-fee checking with rewards on everyday debit card spending
Employees of Olympia Brewery or regional workers seeking credit union membership with regional pride
Families looking to combine multiple members' rewards points for faster travel or merchandise redemption
Consumers who value fee-free ATM access nationwide and straightforward account management
diagnosis: O Bee Credit Union is ideal for Washington State residents seeking a genuinely fee-free checking account with meaningful debit card rewards and nationwide ATM access. The main caveat is geographic restriction to Washington State membership eligibility, which eliminates it for out-of-state consumers; additionally, while debit card rewards are competitive for checking products, the rate trails most rewards credit cards.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
